description_long: This is a medium-sized, irregularly shaped rock with a rugged, natural appearance. Its surface is predominantly dark gray to black, interspersed with large patches of rusty brown coloration, suggesting weathering or mineral deposits. The rock has a somewhat rounded yet angular form, with several visible cracks and subtle surface undulations that add to its rough texture. The brown areas appear to be concentrated on the upper and side surfaces, possibly indicating exposure to the elements or contact with soil. The surface finish is mostly matte with some slightly glossy patches, hinting at occasional moisture or mineral sheen. This rock would be a common sight in urban parks, landscaped medians, or as a decorative obstacle in public spaces.
description: A rugged, dark gray rock with rusty brown patches and a rough, weathered surface. Its irregular shape and natural texture make it suitable for urban landscaping or as a barrier.
description_view_0: This view shows the rock's broadest face, with extensive rusty brown patches and visible surface cracks.
description_view_1: Here, the rock appears more angular, with the brown coloration concentrated on the upper left and a darker, less textured lower area.
description_view_2: This side highlights a continuous band of brown across the middle, with a smoother, slightly glossier surface.
description_view_3: This angle reveals a prominent brown patch on the right and several fine surface scratches, emphasizing the rock's roughness.
